playbook.intent: Blank repo on Monday → vertical agent with paying customer-zero workload on production, eval harness, observability, drift detection, rollback button.
playbook.scope: Single-vertical agent (e.g. AI SDR, code-review bot, support triage) goes from blank repo to a paying customer-zero workload on production traffic, with eval harness, observability, drift detection and rollback in place. Covers prototype, eval bootstrap, hardening, customer-zero pilot, and GA rollout.

success-criteria.criterion: Working agent on production traffic for customer-zero
CI-gated eval harness with golden trajectories
OTEL trajectory traces visible per request
Drift detector firing on cost/quality/refusal anomalies
One-click rollback validated under chaos test

stage.name: Prototype
stage.intent: Spike a working agent loop on the vertical task with one frontier model.

tasks.task: Pick agent pattern: plan-execute vs ReAct
Define tool surface and output schema

stage.decision-gate: Advance if ≥7/10 golden tasks complete without manual recovery.

stage.name: Schema & Tools
stage.intent: Lock structured outputs and tool contracts before scaling traffic.

tasks.task: Draft strict schema with refusal field
Name tools verb-object; describe as prompts

stage.decision-gate: Advance when schema validates 100% on golden trace replay.

stage.name: Memory & Context
stage.intent: Decide how agent carries state across turns and what gets evicted.

tasks.task: Order prompt for cache prefix reuse

stage.decision-gate: Advance when context stays under budget on the longest trace.

stage.name: Guardrails & Routing
stage.intent: Insert cheap guardrails, model cascade, and circuit breakers.

tasks.task: Wire cheap-guardrail tripwires on tool inputs

stage.decision-gate: Advance if cost-per-success ≤ budget on golden set.

stage.name: Eval Harness
stage.intent: CI-gated eval harness with judges and chaos pack before pilot traffic.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when every prompt/model PR runs the suite.

stage.name: Pilot & GA
stage.intent: Customer-zero pilot, then GA with rollback wired.

tasks.task: Run agent on real customer traffic shadow first

outputs.output: Pilot report with N failure modes

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after rollback button is exercised in chaos test.

extra.value: ['Horizontal multi-tenant platforms — out of scope, single vertical only', Frontier-model research — uses available models off the shelf]
[Defined vertical use case with a buyer who will pilot, Access to one frontier model API + one open-weight fallback]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content vertical-agent-prototype-to-production --format md, agent: faion get-content vertical-agent-prototype-to-production --format context, json: faion get-content vertical-agent-prototype-to-production --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
